design.useTheme: three-way mode (dark|light|system); resolved theme reactively flips data-theme on <html>; persisted to localStorage[viewer.theme]; system mode subscribes to prefers-color-scheme media query
design.dagExport: exportSvg(svg, opts) -> Blob; exportPng(svg, opts) -> Promise; SVG inlines computed styles for standalone rendering; PNG rasterises via off-screen + at 2x default scale; downloadBlob helper
design.presentation_layer: both are presentation-layer polish · grouped per spec scope

dumb_component_compliance.useTheme: pure composable, no Vue templates; intelligence (mode resolution + DOM root attribute) lives here, not in any consumer's <script setup>
dumb_component_compliance.dagExport: pure service module · no component, no Vue · caller passes live SVGSVGElement

notes: Theme toggle + DAG topology export. SVG export inlines a curated subset of computed styles (fill/stroke/opacity/font-*) so paper-figure exports render standalone without the viewer stylesheet. PNG export uses 2x scale by default.
